📦 VSCode Extension Download

Branch: {{BRANCH_NAME}}

{{VSIX_FILE}} 📥 Download .vsix
How to install:
1. Download the .vsix file above.
2. Open VSCode and go to the Extensions view (Ctrl+Shift+X).
3. Click the "..." (More Actions) in the top-right corner.
4. Select "Install from VSIX..." and choose the downloaded file.
